description: A plain candid event photograph with no on-image text or graphic design. It shows an outdoor naturalization/citizenship ceremony at Pearl Harbor: a young man in a U.S. Army dress uniform (with a red-and-white lei) shakes hands with a woman in a blue blazer; to the right stands a smiling older man in a dark suit and another man in a flat-brimmed National Park Service ranger hat. In the background a seated audience of attendees, several in military uniforms (Marine Corps, Army) and wearing leis, watches under a covered pavilion. Natural daylight, documentary style. Not a designed meme/poster - it is a routine ceremony photo. Tweet celebrates welcoming 11 service members as new U.S. citizens on Memorial Day at Pearl Harbor (#NewUSCitizens).
